case_title: ADAMS, DAVID W. vs. MARMON, WAYNE AKA WAYNNE M. MARMON et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARMON, WAYNE AKA WAYNNE M. MARMON
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAMS, DAVID W. AS TO DEFENDANT MARMON, WAYNE AKA WAYNNE M. MARMON MARINA, JIMMY LNU, RUDY DOES 1 TO 10
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, CALENDAR OF APR-08-1996, DENIED DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR AT HEARING.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARMON, WAYNE AKA WAYNNE M. MARMON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 780 NATOMA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94103 $2,325.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,038.00, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARMON, WAYNE AKA WAYNNE M. MARMON

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF ADAMS PRESENT W ATNY LANE PARKER. DEFT MARMON PRESENT IN PRO PER. PLTF STATES HE WILL DISM CASE W/OUT PREJUDICE AS TO THE TWO OTHER NAMED DEFTS: JIMMY MARINA AND RUDY LNU. ORAL AND/OR DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND ARGUMENTS MADE. COURT TAKES CASE UNDER SUBMISSION. CLERK DIRECTED TO CALL PLTF ATNY 6-MAY-96 AND TO HOLD JUDGMENT IN COURTROOM FOR HIS PICKUP.
PER PLTF ORAL MOTION, COURT ORDERS DISML W/OUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT JIMMY MARINA AND DEFT RUDY LNU.
